title: Amtech - 15-LED Hurricane Lamp for Camping, Barbeques, Emergency, and More, Lightweight, Portable with Carry Handle and Hanging Hook, Adjustable Brightness, Batteries Included
features: OUTDOOR STAPLE: With a vintage feel and modern light that’s perfect for lighting up all your favourite home and outdoor activities, such as garden parties, camping, barbeques, picnics, fishing, and more. It’s also great for emergencies and power cuts!

SUPER BRIGHT: 15 LEDs (95 lumen) for a strong light that’s not harsh. Supplied with 4xAA batteries, it’s got an on/off switch with a dimmer function so that you can easily adjust the brightness to your preference.
EASY TO USE: Lightweight and portable, this 23.5 x 11.5cm lamp features a handy carry handle and hanging hook so you can easily take it with you wherever you go.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That's why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: From the manufacturer The lamp’s brightness is easy to adjust for your needs. Ideal for indoor and outdoor use, camping, fishing, garden parties, emergency use, and more. 15 LEDs (95 lumen) 4 x AA batteries included
